title: If a firm cannot invest retained earnings to earn a rate of return _____the required rate of return on retained earnings…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: If a firm cannot invest retained earnings to earn a rate of return _____the required rate of return on retained earnings, it should return those funds to its stockholders. fill the blank

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
below

less than or equal to

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
The current risk-free rate of return (rRF
) is 4.67% while the market risk premium is 6.63%. The D’Amico Company has a beta of 1.56. Using the capital asset pricing model (CAPM) approach, D’Amico’s cost of equity is     .

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
The cost of equity using CAPM can be calculated using the formula:

Cost of Equity = rRF + (β × (Market Risk Premium))

Plugging in the given values:

Cost of Equity = 4.67% + (1.56 × 6.63%)
Cost of Equity = 4.67% + 10.35%
Cost of Equity = 14.02%

Therefore, D'Amico's cost of equity using the CAPM approach is 14.02%.
